calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-23-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Don Sullivan; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Mickey Donnelly, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Northpoint Apartments.
Attorney, Jonathan H. Bornstein, representing the plaintiff.

Defendant, Yuko Murakani, is present.
Attorney, Matt Metzger, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 2210 Stockton Street, No. 205, San Francisco, California.

This case settled, the trial date of SEP-28-2009 is vacated.
